title: Integrated Assessment of Water Resource Carrying Capacity: Dynamics, Obstacles, Coordination and Driving Mechanisms in the Gansu Section of the Yellow River Basin, China
description: SpeakForWater Episode 3: Integrated Assessment of Water Resource Carrying Capacity: Dynamics, Obstacles, Coordination and Driving Mechanisms in the Gansu Section of the Yellow River Basin, China. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
